parties.intro: This SOW is ready for your Technijian-side counter-signature. Bryan Burkhart will receive his invitation after your signature is captured.

Please review and sign the attached Statement of Work for the BBC Autonomous Lead Generation System Automation Phase. Ravi Jain has already counter-signed on Technijian's side. Fixed-fee build $26,360, recurring ~$844/mo (hosting + lead-enrichment subs + Anthropic API tokens). Operator support is invoiced weekly under Hourly Contract 5516.
